SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT  

THIS SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT (the "SHA") is made on the 3rd day of October, 2023  

BETWEEN  

1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S8765432B, of 123 Orchard Road, #05-67, Singapore 238888, Email: emily.tan@fictionalmail.sg, Phone: +65 9123 4567  

2. Mr. John Lim, NRIC No. S2345678C, residing at 456 Raffles Place, #12-34, Singapore 048888, Email: john.lim@fictitiousdomain.sg, Phone: +65 9876 5432  

3. ABC Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN: 198765432H, having its registered office at 789 Marina Bay, #20-01, Singapore 018900, Email: contact@abcinnovations.sg, Phone: +65 6234 5678  

WHEREAS the parties wish to define their respective rights and obligations as shareholders in the company, and to provide for the management and control of the company.  

The parties agree that the purchase price for the shares shall be SGD 500,000 as set forth in the SPA.  

It is understood that the project status must be reviewed quarterly and the current project plan is not meeting all initial benchmarks.  

For further information, please refer to the document available at https://example.sg/user/S8765432B  

This SHA and any terms agreed herein shall be binding upon execution by the parties.
